questions.question: Which of the following best describes manufacturing?

options.B: Conversion of raw materials into finished goods

questions.explanation: Manufacturing involves converting raw materials into more valuable finished goods.

questions.question: Which sector of the economy mainly includes manufacturing industries?
questions.explanation: Manufacturing industries are part of the secondary sector.

questions.question: Which of the following industries helps modernize agriculture?
questions.explanation: Agro-based industries support agriculture through fertilizers, tools and equipment.

questions.question: Which type of industry supplies raw materials to other industries?
questions.explanation: Basic industries supply raw materials required for other industries.

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of a consumer industry?
questions.explanation: Consumer industries produce goods used directly by consumers.

questions.question: Industries owned and operated by the government are called:
questions.explanation: Public sector industries are owned and managed by government agencies.

questions.question: Which factor contributed to the early development of cotton textile industries in Maharashtra and Gujarat?
questions.explanation: Cotton textile industries developed near cotton growing regions.

questions.question: Which river region has the largest concentration of jute mills in India?
questions.explanation: Most jute mills are located along the Hugli River in West Bengal.

questions.question: Which of the following is a major raw material required for steel production?
questions.explanation: Iron ore is the main raw material used in steel manufacturing.

questions.question: Which region of India has the highest concentration of iron and steel industries?
questions.explanation: The Chhotanagpur Plateau has abundant raw materials for steel production.

questions.question: Aluminium smelting industries require which important factor for their location?
questions.explanation: Aluminium smelting requires a large amount of electricity.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a property of aluminium?
questions.explanation: Aluminium is lightweight and corrosion resistant.

questions.question: Which sector of the chemical industry produces synthetic fibers and plastics?
questions.explanation: Organic chemicals include petrochemicals used for plastics and synthetic fibers.

questions.question: Which nutrient in fertilizers is completely imported by India?
questions.explanation: India imports potash because it does not have sufficient reserves.

questions.question: Which raw material is essential for cement manufacturing?
questions.explanation: Limestone is the primary raw material used in cement production.

questions.question: Which industry manufactures trucks, buses and motorcycles?
questions.explanation: The automobile industry manufactures vehicles for transportation.

questions.question: Which Indian city is a major centre of IT and electronics industries?
questions.explanation: Bengaluru is considered the electronic capital of India.

questions.question: Which type of pollution is caused by sulphur dioxide and carbon monoxide emissions?
questions.explanation: These gases contribute to air pollution from industries.

questions.question: Which industries are responsible for releasing dyes and chemicals into water bodies?
questions.explanation: Textile and chemical industries often discharge dyes and chemicals into water.

questions.question: What type of pollution is caused by loud machinery and factory equipment?
questions.explanation: Loud industrial equipment produces noise pollution.

questions.question: Which method reduces industrial air pollution?
questions.explanation: Electrostatic precipitators reduce particulate matter in industrial emissions.

questions.question: Which method helps reduce industrial water pollution?
questions.explanation: Recycling and treating wastewater reduces water pollution.

questions.question: Which organisation in India has ISO certification for environmental management?
questions.explanation: NTPC has ISO certification for Environmental Management Systems.

questions.question: Which concept ensures economic growth while protecting the environment?
questions.explanation: Sustainable development balances economic development with environmental protection.

questions.question: Which step helps reduce land pollution from industries?
questions.explanation: Recycling and proper waste management reduce land pollution.
